description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printFittingComfortWashcare Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery This is the perfect tee to return all the heckling you endured from your vegetarian buddies for being a hard core carnivore. Team up this tee from tantra with jeans or chinos and look completely harmless to your prey until it comes to get a closer look at you.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
